title: Anchored Spec — EA Security Requirement
description: A security requirement aligned to NIST SP 800-53 or equivalent frameworks.

controlFamily.description: NIST 800-53 control family (e.g., AC, AU, IA, SC)

nistControl.description: Specific NIST control identifier (e.g., AC-2, AU-6, SC-7)

implementationStatus.description: Current implementation status of this control

complianceFrameworks.description: Applicable compliance frameworks (e.g., NIST 800-53, FedRAMP, SOC2)

supersededBy.description: ID of the artifact that supersedes this one
